data.title: U.S. Small-Cap Stocks Achieve Longest Winning Streak in Seven Years
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, U.S. small-cap stocks have reached a significant milestone, marking their longest winning streak against large-cap stocks in seven years. On Monday, the Russell 2000 Index closed at a record high, extending its consecutive victories over the S&P 500 Index to seven days. The last time a longer winning streak occurred was in January 2019, when the stock market was recovering from a sharp decline.

data.title: Helius Labs’ CEO gives Solana edge in AI benefits over EVM networks
data.description:
The CEO of Helius Labs, Mert Mumtaz, whose company provides infrastructure and tooling for Solana developers, stated in a post on X that Solana’s program model is fundamentally safer for AI development than the interface model used by Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM)-based blockchains. He also predicted the emergence of several billion-dollar startups on Solana this […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/helius-labs-ceo-gives-solana-edge-in-ai/

data.title: Truebit Protocol hack blamed on contract price calculation misconfiguration
data.description:
The SlowMist blockchain security outfit shared its report of the audit on the hack that drained $26 million from the Truebit Protocol. According to the report, the root cause of the attack was that the addition operation in the numerator of the Purchase contract’s price calculation did not use the SafeMath library for overflow protection. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/truebit-protocol-hack-price-misconfiguration/

data.description:

data.title: Meme coin trader takes advantage of regulatory loopholes to make millions off prediction markets
data.description:
